description: SSOT for module freeze states. Lovable and all AI assistants MUST check this file before modifying any module code. If a module is frozen, changes to its paths are NOT ALLOWED without explicit unfreeze.
freeze_criteria: Spec vorhanden, Audit S1-S6 bestanden, produktionsreife Implementierung

MOD-00.reason: Re-frozen after Storage Audit P5: Armstrong Datenraum UI added to ContextPanel via EntityStorageTree, useArmstrongDocUpload refactored to SSOT

MOD-02.reason: Re-frozen after Storage Audit P3: Signature upload normalized to SSOT path {tenant_id}/MOD_02/signatures/{profile_id}/ with signed URL

MOD-03.reason: Re-frozen after Datenraum UX fix: single-click=select, double-click=download, inline actions always visible, drop overlay scoped to content, column width 320px, tooltips for long filenames

MOD-04.reason: Re-frozen after PDF-Pipeline V10.1: ValuationPdfPipeline (4-stage), dynamic TOC, AI narratives, photos, energy data, blob preview

MOD-05.reason: Re-frozen after Deep Audit: PetsCaring error fallback added

MOD-06.reason: Re-frozen after PDF-CI Phase 2: Exposé PDF button integrated in ExposeDetail via registry

MOD-07.reason: Re-frozen after DMS SSOT unification: FinanceDocumentsManager migrated to delete_storage_file/delete_storage_folder RPCs

MOD-11.reason: Re-frozen after R-1 refactoring: FMEinreichung.tsx split into 5 Cards + fmEinreichungTypes.ts + fmEinreichungHelpers.tsx

MOD-12.reason: Re-frozen after DMS SSOT migration: AcqDataRoom replaced with EntityStorageTree in ObjekteingangList + ObjekteingangDetail

MOD-13.reason: Re-frozen after ENG-VALUATION Gap #9: ProjectValuationSection added with Bewertung tab in ProjectDetailPage

MOD-14.reason: Re-frozen after ElevenLabs voice selection + AgentSyncCard added to Zone 2 KiTelefonPage

MOD-17.reason: Re-frozen after PDF-CI SSOT: LogbookExport.tsx migrated to CI-A pdfCiKit

MOD-18.reason: Re-frozen after PDF-CI Phase 2: PdfExportFooter replaced with template+consent gate, registry runtime active
